Description: A terminal user interface (TUI) application for following NHL hockey games in real-time.

What Is: A native Git client with smart merge conflict resolution. Built with Tauri 2 and Vue 3, offering a desktop app, CLI, and VS Code extension with AI-powered features.

Platforms: Mac, Windows, Linux, Android, iPhone, Android Tablet, iPad

Description: Free macOS app that shrinks images, videos, and PDFs by drag-and-drop
Features: No registration required, No Tracking, Dark Mode, Ad-free, Works Offline, PDF compression, Remove metadata, Batch conversion, Drag and Drop, File Compression, Video Converter, Side-by-Side Comparison, Lossless Compression, Image resizing, Presets, PNG Compression, Image Optimizer, Side-by-Side View, Support for Keyboard Shortcuts, Image Conversion
What Is: A small macOS utility that compresses images, videos, and PDFs. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, TIFF, BMP for images and MP4 with H.264/HEVC for video.

Description: A cloud-based AI agent designed to function as a persistent digital worker
What Is: A traditional OS takes instructions. An AI OS takes objectives. Personal Computer gives Perplexity Computer and Comet Assistant always-on, local access to your machine's files, apps, and sessions.
